name: suno-fastapi-app-root
description: Root control scripts for FastAPI backend, React frontend, backups and deployment.

scripts.install:react: rm -f frontend-react/package-lock.json && rm -rf frontend-react/node_modules/.vite frontend-react/.vite && npm --prefix frontend-react install
scripts.restart: npm run stop && npm run start
scripts.react:install: rm -f frontend-react/package-lock.json && rm -rf frontend-react/node_modules/.vite frontend-react/.vite && npm --prefix frontend-react install
scripts.deploy:full: sudo bash scripts/backup-srv.sh && rm -f frontend-react/package-lock.json && rm -rf frontend-react/node_modules/.vite frontend-react/.vite && npm --prefix frontend-react install && sudo bash scripts/publish-react.sh publish && sudo systemctl restart songstudio-vanilla && sudo systemctl reload apache2
